zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Jane Hoord於1397年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾巴書其時，她的父親John Hoord19歲，母親Mrs. John Hoord38歲。她於1419年與Gruffudd Kynaston在英國英格蘭史洛普爾巴書其結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫，埋葬在英國史洛普爾艾勒斯莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Jane Hoord于1397年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾巴書其时，她的父亲John Hoord19岁，母亲Mrs. John Hoord38岁。她于1419年与Gruffudd Kynaston在英国英格兰史洛普爾巴書其结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫，埋葬在英国史洛普爾艾勒斯莫。

nameMeanings.name: Hoord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Heard
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English herd(e), hird(e), hord(e), Older Scots herd, hird ‘herdsman’, i.e. one who looked after cattle, sheep, or goats (Old English heorde, hierde). Compare Hardman .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Jane Hoord was born in 1397, in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hoord, was 19 and her mother, Mrs. John Hoord, was 38. She married Gruffudd Kynaston in 1419, in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, and was buried in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Jane Hoord est née en 1397, à Baschurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Hoord, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Hoord, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Gruffudd Kynaston en 1419, à Baschurch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Ellesmere, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Jane Hoord 1397 in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hoord 19 und ihre Mutter Mrs. John Hoord 38. Sie hat 1419 in Baschurch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Gruffudd Kynaston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England und wurde in Ellesmere, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jane Hoord è nata il nel 1397 nel Baschurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Hoord, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Mrs. John Hoord, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Gruffudd Kynaston nel 1419, nel Baschurch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel Ellesmere, Shropshire, England, e fu sepolta a Ellesmere, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Jane Hoordが1397年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアバシュルチで生まれた時，父John Hoordは19歳，母Mrs. John Hoordは38歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアバシュルチでGruffudd Kynastonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアで死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアエレスメアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Jane Hoord(이)가 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 바슈르치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hoord(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. John Hoord(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 바슈르치에서 Gruffudd Kynaston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에서 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 엘레스머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Jane Hoord nasceu em 1397, em Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Hoord, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Hoord, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Gruffudd Kynaston em 1419, em Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Jane Hoord родилась в 1397 г. в местности бащурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hoord было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Hoord, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gruffudd Kynaston в 1419 г. в местности бащурч, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности эллесмир, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Jane Hoord nació en 1397, en Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Hoord, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Mrs. John Hoord, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Gruffudd Kynaston en 1419, en Baschurch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Ellesmere, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
